summary: Tested new Flusso Analisi feature for Evolution PRO. All 26 backend tests pass (100%). Admin panel GestioneFlussoAnalisi.jsx works correctly with client list, filters, timeline, and editable analysis sections. DecisionePartnershipPage requires cliente_analisi login which has a password field mismatch issue (password_hash vs hashed_password).

minor.issue: Password field mismatch for cliente_analisi users - auth service looks for 'hashed_password' but users have 'password_hash'

integration_issues.issue: Login fails with 'hash could not be identified' error due to password field mismatch in database

action_items: Fix password field mismatch: auth service should check both 'hashed_password' and 'password_hash' fields for cliente_analisi users
critical_code_review_comments: The auth.py authenticate_user function only checks 'hashed_password' field but cliente_analisi users have 'password_hash' field

success_rate.frontend: 90% - Admin panel works, cliente login has password field issue

seed_data_creation: Test client 'Demo Utente Test' already exists with stato_cliente='decisione_partnership'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Flusso Analisi backend APIs all working. Admin panel GestioneFlussoAnalisi.jsx displays correctly with timeline, filters, and editable sections. The /decisione-partnership page requires cliente_analisi login which fails due to password field mismatch. Fix needed in auth.py to check both 'hashed_password' and 'password_hash' fields.

frontend_admin_panel.filter_buttons: ✅ Tutti, Questionario Inviato, Bozza Analisi, Pronta per Call, Fase Decisione, Partner Attivo
frontend_admin_panel.client_modal: ✅ Shows timeline, analysis sections with edit buttons
frontend_admin_panel.action_buttons: ✅ Conferma Analisi, Attiva Fase Decisione, Conferma Bonifico

frontend_cliente_page.DecisionePartnershipPage.jsx: ⚠️ Cannot test - requires cliente login which fails
